_comment: FRAME auto-scans the library/ tree for frames, so you do NOT need to list frames here. This file only points FRAME at the repo and holds optional per-frame overrides. Organize freely: library/<vendor>/<collection>/, optionally with corners/ and profiles/ subfolders. Corner files encode dimensions (CODE_FACE_dDEPTH_rRABBET.ext); profile files are the plain code (CODE.ext).
